exhibited  particles  size  of  161.22  nm  with  polydispersity  index  of  0.229  and  zeta  potential
value  of  10.99  mV. The  formulation  exhibited  78.9%  entrapment  of  vinorelbine  ditartrate. The
nanoparticle was able to sustain the release of vinorelbine for more than 140 hr in the in vitro
release  studies.  Conclusion:  From  studying  the  obtained  results,  it  could  be  concluded  from
the  investigation  that  PLGA-chitosan  nanoparticles  could  be  good  approach  to  improve  the
bioavailability of the entrapped drug.
